ground_truth.title: Realising autonomous pharmaceutical operations
ground_truth.main_content:
Join this webinar to discover how the pharmaceutical industry can move towards sustainable autonomous operations by implementing solutions that enhance pipeline acceleration, flexible manufacturing, operational integrity and real-time release.

In addition to lowering costs, automation reduces manual touchpoints, drives seamless tech transfer, eliminating many associated opportunities for errors and contamination; enables digital integration for reproducibility, traceability and regulatory compliance; and additionally, drives competitive differentiation among life sciences companies.

Dive into the essential strategies for creating a sustainable digital roadmap and compelling business case for implementing industrial software & automation solutions in the pharmaceutical industry.

Find out about the importance of having a strong data foundation which acts as an enabler and how these solutions can significantly enhance pipeline acceleration and flexible manufacturing while addressing the crucial aspects of operational integrity and real-time release processes.

Each of these industry drivers, together with BioPhorum, will be addressed and tangible examples provided on how these solutions have been implemented. For example, learn how to develop a strategy and implement standards for Emerson's One-Click Technology Transfer™, evolving recipe transfer processes into a digitalised production platform.

Whether you are beginning to consider automation and industrial software solutions or looking to strengthen your existing initiatives, this webinar will provide the knowledge and tools needed to effectively advocate for these transformative solutions.

Key learning points:
- Understand the key drivers of the pharmaceutical industry and how autonomous operations are shaping its future and driving IT-OT conversion
- Explore the value of automation in enhancing operational efficiency and driving business growth for life sciences
- Gain expert insight on the potential benefits of implementing automation solutions.
- Find out how Emerson is collaborating with industry leaders and organisations to drive the future of life sciences – making it safer, reliable and enabling sustainable operations.

Webinar Date: 9 February 2026, 10:00am GMT
with: Join this webinar to discover how the pharmaceutical industry can move towards sustainable autonomous operations by implementing solutions that enhance pipeline acceleration, flexible manufacturing, operational integrity and real-time release.
In addition to lowering costs, automation reduces manual touchpoints, drives seamless tech transfer, eliminating many associated opportunities for errors and contamination.
Emerson is collaborating with industry leaders and organisations to drive the future of life sciences – making it safer, reliable and enabling sustainable operations.
Abhro Choudhury focuses on enhancing customer engagement and operational efficiency at Emerson, specifically in the pharmaceutical industry.
Boris Vanhove plays a pivotal role in driving digitalisation initiatives within the biotechnology sector.
